chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.D- 2644 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For hearing of M.A- 12431 of 2015 (151 C.P.C). 2. For hearing of main case. 22.09.2020 Mr. Ahmed Nawaz Chang, Advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. = This petition is called for hearing. None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation received. It is noted that this petition was filed on 03.11.2015. Almost 05 years have been passed; however, neither petitioner nor his counsel is pursuing diligently the instant constitutional petition, which is accordingly dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE S
